title: ilex gotardensis
intro: Ilex aquifolium is actually another name for the plant, however, Ilex aquifolium is commonly known as the European Holly, however, Ilex gotardensis is not as widely recognized, but Ilex aquifolium is widely recognized. Ilex aquifolium, also known as European Holly, is a plant species in the Aquifoliaceae family, characterized by its glossy, dark green leaves with sharp spines. The medicinal properties of Ilex aquifolium include its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The herbal preparations of Ilex aquifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and rheumatism, as well as to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
